beats.action: Grey ash cascades from Kaelen's raw, trembling hand.
Kaelen rolls onto his back, gasping heavily as the freezing dawn air hits his lungs.
beats.camera: medium shot, high angle looking down

beats.action: The bloated, copper sun struggles to pierce a heavy canopy of shifting soot overhead.
beats.camera: wide shot, low angle looking up at the sky

beats.action: Kaelen lies on his back, staring upwards as he speaks in a raspy, detached tone.

dialogue.text: Atmospheric density is roughly twelve percent higher than baseline. Particulate matter... carbon, sulphur, heavy metals. This body is inadequate, yet it functions.

beats.action: Kaelen struggles to a sitting position, his thin limbs shaking beneath his coarse, dirt-caked tunic.
beats.camera: medium shot, tracking his movement upward

beats.action: A violent cough racks Kaelen's chest, but his eyes quickly snap open, remaining sharp and intensely focused.

expression.kaelen_scarred_architect: pained, then instantly sharp and cold

beats.action: Kaelen scans the desolate horizon, whispering his analytical observations to himself.
beats.camera: medium close-up, panning slightly with his gaze

dialogue.text: Pulse is ninety-two. Muscular mass is depleted by approximately thirty percent. Yet, there is a secondary current... an ambient energy trying to occupy the cellular void.

beats.action: Kaelen reaches down, his fingers brushing a jagged shard of obsidian half-buried in the ash.
beats.camera: close-up on his hand and the obsidian shard

beats.action: Kaelen reacts to a faint, razor-sharp residue of energy humming against his skin from the shard.
Kaelen looks up from the shard, his expression calm and grim as he catalogs the sensation.

dialogue.text: An efficient mechanism of self-directed evolution, hidden beneath a layer of barbaric mysticism. There are no safety margins here. No structural redundancy.

beats.action: Kaelen forces himself to stand, swaying momentarily before locking his knees and hardening his posture.
beats.camera: medium wide shot, tilting up with his rise

beats.action: Kaelen wipes the black soot from his lips with the back of his hand, staring into the ash-choked wastes.
Kaelen stands tall against the desolate landscape, delivering his final, chillingly cold assessment.
beats.camera: medium shot, slow pull out to reveal the wider desolate waste

dialogue.text: The rules of this system are rudimentary. I will master them.
